query: SELECT id, planType, name, priceMonthly, priceAnnual, isActive, sortOrder, earlyNotificationMinutes, stripeProductId, stripePriceIdMonthly, stripePriceIdAnnual, features FROM subscription_plans ORDER BY planType, sortOrder;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user sHLCts4RR6iL2PA.1ead08cf1a54 --database bBuQZrfKLoBs6LmtvQ4y6E --execute SELECT id, planType, name, priceMonthly, priceAnnual, isActive, sortOrder, earlyNotificationMinutes, stripeProductId, stripePriceIdMonthly, stripePriceIdAnnual, features FROM subscription_plans ORDER BY planType, sortOrder;
